title: Siege Weapons
description: This Mod adds medieval siege weaopons into Minecraft.
body: # Siege Weapons Mod *Bring medieval warfare to Minecraft!* --- --- This mod adds **functional catapults, ballistae**, and more siege engines in future – complete with realistic physics, customizable recipes, and immersive gameplay. --- ## Play with Friends! Want to play together with your friends? Check out **DatHost** for the best performance and easy setup! ### How to Get Started 1. Go to [**DatHost using my Link**](https://dathost.net/r/talhanation/minecraft-server-hosting) 2. Register your account. 3. Once registered, choose the plan that fits your needs 4. The **30% discount will be applied automatically** at checkout. **Important:** The discount only works if you order your server using this [** my Link**](https://dathost.net/r/talhanation/minecraft-server-hosting) ! [![DatHost](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d6ec0353-37bd-4f09-a427-694da9f8c500)](https://dathost.net/minecraft-server-hosting?ref=talhanation) --- ## Features ### Catapults - Launch projectiles with realistic trajectories and deadly force. - **Projectile Types**: - **Cobblestone** – 50 Damage - **Cobble Cluster** – 12x mini rocks, 20 Damage each - **Fire Pot** – Ignites an area on impact - **Explosive Pot** – TNT-like area damage - Control with **WASD** and **Space** to load and shoot - Hold **Right-Click** to show the trajectory preview ### Ballistae - Precision weapon with a **special aiming mode** (Right-Click) - Fires fast and deadly bolts with realistic ballistics ### Siege Table - Craft your siege weapons directly using a dedicated **Siege Table** ### Repair System - Repair your siege weapons using **Iron Nuggets** and **Wooden Planks** --- ## Compatibility & Configuration - ✅ Built for **Minecraft Forge 1.20.1** > Recommended version: `1.20.1 - 47.4.0` - ✅ Fully configurable via `saves/world/serverconfig/siegeweapons.toml` --- ## Installation 1. Install [Minecraft Forge 1.20.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 2. Drop the mod into your `mods/` folder 3. Launch the game and prepare your siege! --- ## Feedback & Issues Found a bug or have suggestions? Join the community on [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/NG8vuDekTT)! --- ## My Other Mods ### [![recruits-icon](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/20dc335a-fdcd-4075-a317-4047c040a020)](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits) [**Villager Recruits**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits): Command your own **Villager Army** into war! Now with **Diplomacy and Factions**! --- ### [![workers-icon](https://github.com/talhanation/wiki/assets/10392726/7b2f12d9-793a-491f-ba0a-c91bc3bf9e2c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-workers) [**Villager Workers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-workers): Hire Villagers and let them **work for you**! --- ### [![smallships-icon](https://github.com/talhanation/wiki/assets/10392726/1c579ef7-61a9-404a-bd37-99be59930b5b)](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) [**Small Ships**](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships): Explore the oceans in your **own sailable ships**! --- **Prepare for war. Build your siege weapon. Dominate the battlefield.**
